vocab.meaning: phân vân/lưỡng lự giữa hai lựa chọn
vocab.example: It was a toss up between Law and Journalism, but I eventually realized my heart was in storytelling.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ tìm thấy/phát hiện ra
vocab.example: I actually stumbled upon a documentary about marine biology and was instantly hooked, which led me to change my major.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu/dấn thân vào (một lộ trình, sự nghiệp)
vocab.example: I decided to embark on a career in Finance because I've always been fascinated by how global markets operate.

vocab.meaning: hướng đến/nhắm đến một mục tiêu nhất định
vocab.example: My studies are geared towards sustainable development, as I want to contribute to environmental protection in the future.
I mulled over my options for several months before settling on Graphic Design as my primary field of study.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào/khơi gợi (niềm đam mê hoặc ý tưởng)
vocab.example: A high school trip to the stock exchange sparked off my interest in Economics and sparked a lifelong passion.

vocab.meaning: chốt lại/quyết định chọn (sau khi cân nhắc nhiều thứ)
vocab.example: After exploring various creative fields, I finally settled on Architecture as it perfectly combines art and logic.

vocab.meaning: trông cậy vào/hy vọng vào cái gì đó để thành công
vocab.example: I chose Software Engineering because I was banking on the continued growth of the tech industry for job security.

vocab.meaning: tìm hiểu kỹ để thấu hiểu một vấn đề phức tạp
vocab.example: I've always wanted to fathom out how the human brain works, which is why I pursued a degree in Neuroscience.

vocab.meaning: duy trì/tiếp nối (một dự định hoặc truyền thống)
vocab.example: I wanted to carry through my family's legacy in the legal profession, so following in my father's footsteps was a natural choice.
